baseline.notes: Run 34 recovered only +1 TP (F1 0.369→0.372). Diagnostics showed 45% of gated events had no ball detection at all (COCO yolov8m is weak on small distant soccer balls), and many real TPs were rejected just outside the bands (throw_in y=0.25, goal_kick x=0.16–0.17).

targets.notes: Widened bands + soccer-tuned YOLO weight (uisikdag, mAP@0.5=0.785) should lift ball-detection from ~52% to ~80%+ and recover band-edge near-misses. Beating Run 32 (F1 0.396) is the recovery target; breaking 0.42 is breakthrough. Run 35 also collects goalkeeper-position diagnostics for the Run #36 GK-action gate.

notes: Run #35 — band widening + soccer-tuned YOLO (uisikdag/yolo-v8-football-players-detection). _TOUCHLINE_BAND 0.22→0.28, _GOAL_LINE_BAND 0.15→0.20. Swapped YOLO weight from COCO yolov8m to a 4-class soccer model (0=ball, 1=goalkeeper, 2=player, 3=referee); ball_class_id and person/gk_class_ids plumbed through config. GK boxes tracked in diagnostics — data-collection for Run #36 GK-action gate on catch/shot_stop_diving. Backlog B (relax goal_kick vertical band) still deferred.
